text: The department of motor vehicles of this state acting directly or through its duly authorized officers and agents.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 112 — Department

The department of motor vehicles of this state acting directly or through its duly authorized officers and agents.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: The department of motor vehicles of this state acting directly or through its duly authorized officers and agents.
